narrative:
Marysville 14 (precinct in Union County) has 1,057 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
